name: Cisco CCNA Security
description: Validates skills in securing Cisco networks, including firewalls, VPNs, and intrusion prevention fundamentals.

name: Cisco CyberOps Associate
description: Covers SOC fundamentals: monitoring, detecting, and responding to cybersecurity threats using standard SOC tooling.

name: Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
description: Covers offensive security methodology, reconnaissance, and exploitation techniques used to identify weaknesses before attackers do.

name: ISO/IEC 27001
description: Focused on information security management systems (ISMS) — risk assessment, controls, and governance frameworks.

name: Fortinet NSE 4
description: Demonstrates the ability to configure, manage, and troubleshoot FortiGate devices in real-world network security deployments.
